name: venue-templates
tagline: Reference catalog of LaTeX templates and formatting rules for journals, conferences, posters, and grants, with helper scripts.
verdict: Well-organized reference covering 50+ venues with concrete worked examples and a version field. Weak spots: it points to ~20 bundled files that aren't verifiable as present, gives no guidance for LaTeX/script failures, never declares python/pdflatex as prerequisites, and has no negative-trigger scoping.

highlights.summary: Body/scripts call an external AI image service (generate_schematic.py, OpenRouter key) that the frontmatter description never mentions.
No 'NOT for'/out-of-scope language anywhere despite overlapping skills (scientific-writing, literature-review, research-grants) named in the doc.
Multi-step LaTeX compile/script workflow (e.g. 'pdflatex my_paper.tex') never addresses missing tools, script errors, or compile failures.
